📍 Service Area

We serve Winter Garden and the greater Orlando area. 100% mobile — we come to you.

⏰ Hours

Monday to Saturday, 8am to 6pm. At least 24h notice required.

💳 Payment

50% deposit at booking. Balance due on service day. Zelle, Cash and card accepted.

🔄 Cancellations

Rescheduling requires at least 24h notice. Deposits non-refundable for last-minute cancellations.

Dúvidas frequentes

FAQ

Respondemos as perguntas mais comuns dos nossos clientes.

How long does the service take? +

It depends on the service. A full detailing takes between 1.5 to 3 hours depending on the condition of the vehicle.

Do you work on weekends? +

Yes! We make exceptions on weekends. Just send us a text or WhatsApp message to schedule.

What payment methods do you accept? +

We accept bank transfer, Zelle, and cash.

What happens if it rains during the service? +

If it rains, we wait 20–30 minutes for it to pass. If the rain continues, the remaining service is covered by the client. It is the client's responsibility to check the weather before scheduling.

How much notice do I need to cancel? +

Clients must notify us at least 24 hours before the scheduled service. Since we block that time slot exclusively for you, last-minute cancellations mean we lose that appointment. The deposit is non-refundable in these cases.
